subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends, the epistles addressed to Jinab-i-Manshadí—who hath attained the presence of his Lord—and to 'Abdu'l-Bahá, have been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی مکاتیبی که بجناب منشادی من ادرک لقاء ربه و بعبدالبهاء مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
